req.title: Create encounter
req.statement: A clinician shall create an Encounter for a patient with start and end timestamps; end before start shall be rejected.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-006 mandates that clinicians create encounters with valid temporal ordering (end ≥ start). The test suite covers: (1) positive case with valid timestamps (EP), (2) negative case with inverted timestamps triggering 422 (NEG), (3) boundary case with equal start/end (BVA), and (4) additional boundary case testing millisecond precision at the temporal boundary (BVA). These cases ensure deterministic, idempotent validation of encounter creation and rejection logic across the entire decision domain.

tests.name: test_create_encounter_valid_timestamps
tests.executable:
import requests
import json

base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
patient_id = '<fixture:valid_patient_id>'
clinician_token = '<fixture:clinician_auth_token>'

payload = {
  'resourceType': 'Encounter',
  'status': 'finished',
  'subject': {'reference': f'Patient/{patient_id}'},
  'period': {
    'start': '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z',
    'end': '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'
  }
}

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}'}
resp = requests.post(
  f'{base_url}/Encounter',
  json=payload,
  headers=headers
)

assert resp.status_code == 201
data = resp.json()
assert data['period']['start'] == '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z'
assert data['period']['end'] == '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z'
assert 'id' in data

tests.name: test_create_encounter_end_before_start_rejected
expected: response contains error detail about temporal ordering
no side effects on patient state
trace: R-HLT-006: error pathways → 422 when end < start
tests.executable:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
patient_id = '<fixture:valid_patient_id>'
clinician_token = '<fixture:clinician_auth_token>'

payload = {
  'resourceType': 'Encounter',
  'status': 'finished',
  'subject': {'reference': f'Patient/{patient_id}'},
  'period': {
    'start': '2024-01-15T10:00:00Z',
    'end': '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z'
  }
}

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}'}
resp = requests.post(
  f'{base_url}/Encounter',
  json=payload,
  headers=headers
)

assert resp.status_code == 422
assert 'error' in resp.json() or 'issue' in resp.json()

tests.name: test_create_encounter_equal_start_end_boundary
trace: R-HLT-006: boundary value → start equals end (inclusive boundary)
tests.executable:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
patient_id = '<fixture:valid_patient_id>'
clinician_token = '<fixture:clinician_auth_token>'

payload = {
  'resourceType': 'Encounter',
  'status': 'finished',
  'subject': {'reference': f'Patient/{patient_id}'},
  'period': {
    'start': '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z',
    'end': '2024-01-15T09:00:00Z'
  }
}

headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}'}
resp = requests.post(
  f'{base_url}/Encounter',
  json=payload,
  headers=headers
)

assert resp.status_code == 201
data = resp.json()
assert data['period']['start'] == data['period']['end']

tests.name: test_create_encounter_millisecond_precision_boundary
trace: R-HLT-006: boundary value → microsecond inversion detection
BVA: temporal precision at sub-second resolution
